title: Fresh End Crystal x Punchy!
description: A Punchy! resource pack that adds 3D End Crystal Model and Animations.
body:
![Fresh End Crystal Punchy! Edition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ae4a57b25a82daadd8b9fd1191a58b3955d34be.png)
An example resource pack showing of the cool animation possibilites with punchy. It makes the end crystal 3d while also adding animations to it when you're holding it in your hand. Thank you to both Punchy! and Godku for helping me with the pack and also for the awesome mod they made!
